title: taraxacum kozlovii
intro: Taraxacum kozlovii, also known as Kozlov's dandelion or Russian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum kozlovii include the potential to treat digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and support liver function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum kozlovii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves and roots of the plant.
